# Overview

> Step-by-step guides for integrating Nimble IP with popular third-party software

Nimble IP is optimized for compatibility with third-party apps. To help you get started, we've prepared step-by-step guides for integrating Nimble IP with popular third-party software.

***

## Anti-Detect Browsers

Manage multiple accounts with unique browser fingerprints while routing traffic through Nimble's residential proxies.

<CardGroup cols={3}>
  <Card href="/integrations/proxy/integration-guides/vm-login" img="https://mintcdn.com/nimble-f5a8283f/wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv/images/proxy-integrations/vmlogin.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv&q=85&s=43b3b76ed198b31aaef1bcd77e592a2c" title="VMLogin" width="900" height="360" data-path="images/proxy-integrations/vmlogin.png">
    Virtual browser profiles with fingerprint protection
  </Card>

  <Card href="/integrations/proxy/integration-guides/mulogin" img="https://mintcdn.com/nimble-f5a8283f/wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv/images/proxy-integrations/mulogin.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv&q=85&s=6d9a49dfaff75611cd155d56b0c69aba" title="MuLogin" width="900" height="360" data-path="images/proxy-integrations/mulogin.png">

  </Card>

  <Card href="/integrations/proxy/integration-guides/multilogin" img="https://mintcdn.com/nimble-f5a8283f/wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv/images/proxy-integrations/multilogin.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv&q=85&s=5ced480ddb3d0adf57b703849da1f19e" title="Multilogin" width="300" height="120" data-path="images/proxy-integrations/multilogin.png">

    Stealth browsers for multiple accounts
  </Card>

  <Card href="/integrations/proxy/integration-guides/kameleo" img="https://mintcdn.com/nimble-f5a8283f/wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv/images/proxy-integrations/kameleo.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv&q=85&s=97b3e4f6f1873fedd21e92632d0c2e29" title="Kameleo" width="900" height="360" data-path="images/proxy-integrations/kameleo.png">
    Anonymous stealth browsing technology
  </Card>

  <Card href="/integrations/proxy/integration-guides/incogniton" img="https://mintcdn.com/nimble-f5a8283f/wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv/images/proxy-integrations/incogniton.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv&q=85&s=86c8d01fbe1bb42d234a588ae45f9b07" title="Incogniton" width="900" height="360" data-path="images/proxy-integrations/incogniton.png">
    Multi-session browser with unique fingerprints
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

## Browser Extensions and Desktop Apps

Quickly switch between proxies directly from your browser or Desktop.

<CardGroup cols={3}>
  <Card href="/integrations/proxy/integration-guides/foxy-proxy" img="https://mintcdn.com/nimble-f5a8283f/wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv/images/proxy-integrations/foxyproxy.png?fit=max&auto=format&n=wAqNvcyApyKlVgKv&q=85&s=595a8d1fc3aa8a6acb24ab803dd641d4" title="FoxyProxy" width="300" height="120" data-path="images/proxy-integrations/foxyproxy.png">

***

## Quick Reference

All integrations use the same core proxy settings:

| Parameter    | Value                  |
| ------------ | ---------------------- |
| **Host**     | `ip.nimbleway.com`     |
| **Port**     | `7000`                 |
| **Protocol** | HTTP / HTTPS           |
| **Username** | Your pipeline username |
| **Password** | Your pipeline password |

<Info>
  Get your proxy credentials from the [Pipelines](https://app.nimbleway.com/pipelines) page in your Nimble dashboard.
</Info>
